description_long: This is a modern, tactical shotgun with a compact, robust design, primarily finished in matte and dark gray tones. The body features a prominent upper rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the receiver is angular with detailed paneling and venting. The stock is thick and squared, with a padded section for shoulder support and a visible cheek rest, while the pistol grip and foregrip are ergonomically shaped and textured for secure handling. The barrel is short and fitted with a muzzle device, suggesting use in close-quarters urban environments. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers, and the overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components. The shotgun's design emphasizes durability, modularity, and ease of use in tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte gray finish, ergonomic grips, and a robust, modular design. Features include a thick stock, upper accessory rail, and a short barrel with a muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the thick stock, upper rail, ergonomic pistol and foregrip, and short barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, muzzle device, and the alignment of the grips and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with clear visibility of the stock, grips, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, the alignment of the upper rail, and the overall compactness of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with short, vented muzzle device and upper rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, rounded trigger guard with ample space and reinforced edges
